content:
🌟 autoresearch | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To automate and accelerate the iterative process of LLM training and hyperparameter tuning through AI agents.
✨ Key Features: • Autonomous AI agents for LLM training experiments • Self-modifying training code (`train.py`) • Instruction-based agent programming (`program.md`) • Fixed 5-minute training budget per experiment • Validation bits per byte (val_bpb) as the primary metric
📖 Summary: This repository enables autonomous AI agents to conduct LLM training experiments overnight. By modifying Python training scripts and instructions based on performance metrics, the agents aim to iteratively improve model performance without human intervention.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
